name: Input OTP
description: Foldkit-native shadcn base-nova Input OTP wrapper composed from the local Base UI OTP Field primitive and shadcn class tokens for container, group, slot, separator, and examples.

registry.reason: shadcn Input OTP composes the local Base UI OTP Field primitive for value projection, slots, hidden form input, and interaction facts.
The form example composes the local shadcn Button item.
Pattern, RTL, and form examples compose the local shadcn Field item.
shadcn Input OTP uses local class canonicalization and Tailwind conflict handling.

runtime.reason: Provides Html, Attribute, and html factory APIs for Foldkit-native helpers and examples.
Provided by the local Base UI OTP Field dependency for Effect Schema options and interaction facts.
Provided through the local utils/cn registry dependency.
Provided through the local utils/cn registry dependency.

development.reason: Origin shadcn runtime is replaced by the local Foldkit Base UI OTP Field implementation.
The separator icon is represented by local inline SVG instead of adding a runtime icon dependency.
The RTL example uses local static strings instead of the origin app language selector.
React is origin fixture evidence only, not installable Foldkit source.

examples.title: InputOTPDemo
examples.description: Default six-slot OTP example with a complete value.

examples.title: InputOTPSeparatorExample
examples.description: Grouped OTP slots with separator glyphs.

examples.title: InputOTPRtl
examples.description: RTL OTP example using local static labels.

examples.title: InputOTPForm
examples.description: Verification form example with local Field, Button, and static Card shell.

examples.title: InputOTPOriginFixture
examples.description: Static origin-evidence fixture derived from base-nova Input OTP source.

examples.title: InputOTPFoldkitFixture
examples.description: Foldkit parity fixture for dependency-complete shadcn Input OTP composition.

deviations.summary: The upstream input-otp React runtime and context are replaced with local Base UI OTP Field slot inputs.
deviations.rationale: Installable source cannot depend on React or input-otp. The local wrapper preserves the base-nova container, group, slot, active, disabled, invalid, and separator styling while using Foldkit-native value and focus facts.

deviations.summary: The separator icon uses local inline SVG instead of lucide-react.
deviations.rationale: Installable source cannot depend on lucide-react. A local minus SVG preserves the separator role and visual footprint without adding an icon registry item.

deviations.summary: Parity origin fixture uses static source-derived markup for the base-nova Input OTP examples.
deviations.rationale: The root project does not install input-otp. Static fixtures preserve the pinned base-nova class tokens, slots, state attributes, and keyboard behavior without adding the upstream runtime.

deviations.summary: The form example uses a local static Card shell instead of an installable shadcn Card dependency.
deviations.rationale: shadcn/card is not present in this registry yet. Static local Card markup preserves the example structure without expanding the component slice.
